**Diagnostic Step 1.2.3: Verify the "Error Suppression Mode" is enabled on the "Script Execution Engine" (SEE).

Procedure:

a. Navigate to the "SEE Configuration" page, accessible via the "System Administration" menu.
b. Scroll down to the "Error Handling" section and click on the "Edit" button adjacent to the "Error Suppression Mode" field.
c. Set the "Error Suppression Mode" to "Enabled" and click "Save Changes".

**Note:** If the "Error Suppression Mode" is not enabled, the script execution will terminate prematurely due to unexpected errors. In this case, proceed to Diagnostic Step 1.2.4: "Reinitialize the Script Execution Engine".
